items.summary: Chinese regulators have required Meta Platforms to unwind its planned $2b acquisition of AI start up Manus, clearing the way for Tencent to become the largest shareholder. The reversal marks a setback for Meta's AI plans in China and raises questions about its ability to secure and retain key AI assets in important markets.
